applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: call_site: q = ttnn.reshape(q, (batch_size, seq_length, num_local_heads, head_dim)); q = ttnn.transpose(q, 1, 2)  # [B,S,H,D] -> [B,H,S,D] head split before attention matmul; ttnn_replacement: x = ttnn.reshape(x, ({BATCH}, {SEQ}, {NUM_HEADS}, {HEAD_DIM}), memory_config={RESHAPE_MEMCFG}); x = ttnn.transpose(x, 1, 2, memory_config={TRANSPOSE_MEMCFG})
